prompt: Create a polished 3D cartoon editorial scene in a cozy modern interview lounge, formatted as a wide 16:9 image. Two anthropomorphic AI-logo mascot characters sit facing each other in beige upholstered armchairs around a round wooden coffee table. On the left, a black rounded-square mascot body with a large white OpenAI knot logo on its front has black tube arms and legs, white gloved hands, and oversized white sneakers; it is gesturing with one raised index finger as if making a point. On the right, a tan rounded-square mascot body with large black letters “AI” on its front sits with crossed legs and black gloves/boots, leaning back skeptically. Add exactly 2 speech bubbles: the left large bubble says “i’m not charging twice so that developers feel respected instead of exploited”, with “respected” colored green and “exploited” colored red; the right smaller bubble says “that seems difficult to monetize”. Include exactly 3 visible text signs: a small lit shelf sign on the left reading “BUILD SHIP REPEAT”, a framed wall poster on the right reading “ANTHROPIC / SAFETY FIRST* / *TERMS APPLY”, and the black mug logo mark on the table. The coffee table should contain exactly 2 objects: a black mug with a white OpenAI-style logo and a small potted succulent. Background details include dark charcoal walls, warm studio lighting, a bookshelf with plants on the left, a large potted plant on the right, a soft round rug, and shallow depth of field. Use a satirical tech-industry tone, premium toy-like 3D rendering, soft global illumination, expressive body language, clean readable lettering, and no extra characters or additional text. The left speech bubble text may be customized as i’m not charging twice so that developers feel respected instead of exploited; the right speech bubble text may be customized as that seems difficult to monetize; the wall poster headline may be customized as ANTHROPIC / SAFETY FIRST* / *TERMS APPLY; the left character logo may be customized as OpenAI knot logo; the right character label may be customized as AI.
